title: COUNTRY CLUB Progress Pride Flag LGBTQ+ Rainbow Large Microfibre Beach & Bath Towel Lightweight Sports Travel Gym Summer
features: This is an officially licensed Progress Pride Flag Design Towel by Daniel Quasar
Show your support this summer with this microfibre, quick drying Progress Pride Beach & Bath Towel.
Size: 70cm x 150cm and made with high quality microfibre, this towel offers a lightweight and quick drying towel that clearly shows your support to the Pride movement.
Progress Pride Beach & Bath Towel is extremely lightweight, therefore proving exceptionally practical for carrying in a swimming or beach bag
This lightweight material also makes the towel extremely fast drying so that you can be assured your towel will be as dry as possible before going back in the bag at the end of the day.
description: Show your support this summer with this microfibre, quick drying Progress Pride Beach & Bath Towel. Made with high quality microfibre, this towel offers a lightweight and quick drying towel that clearly shows your support to the Pride movement. Being made from microfibre means that this Progress Pride Beach & Bath Towel is extremely lightweight, therefore proving exceptionally practical for carrying in a swimming or beach bag. This lightweight material also makes the towel extremely fast drying so that you can be assured your towel will be as dry as possible before going back in the bag at the end of the day. The internationally recognised Progress Pride design shows vividly your support for the cause and at the size and nature of the towel means it can be readily adapted for use as a flag. When on a march or demonstration, the towel can easily be modified to be wrapped around the body to signify your support far and wide. Product Features: Made from Microfibre Polyester, Size: 70cm x 150cm approx, Manufacturer Part Number: BPV205576 Manufacturer: Beamfeature Ltd Brand: COUNTRY CLUB.
